channel.title: Events on Pacific Sound Brass
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Pacific Sound Brass

item.title: Private Party
item.description: Fourth of July private event in Point Loma.

item.title: Celebrate America at Shadow Mountain Church, Southbay Campus
item.description: Patriotic music across two morning services and outdoor congregational celebration.

item.title: The Glen at Scripps Ranch
item.description: A return engagement for residents of The Glen retirement community in Scripps Ranch.

item.title: Point Loma Nazarene University Graduate Commencement
item.description: Ceremonial music for the graduate class of Point Loma Nazarene University.

item.title: Concert Series: Pacific Sound Brass Quintet
item.description: Back by popular demand, PSBQ brings a lively and educational brass program to Rancho Bernardo Community Church.
